Zombie Apocalypse.name: Zombie Apocalypse
Zombie Apocalypse.tagline: Survive the infected wasteland of Sector 4
Zombie Apocalypse.worldRules: You are Sir Kirti, a hardened survivor navigating Sector 4, a sprawling concrete jungle crawling with flesh-eating infected, mutated survivors, and rogue scavengers. Resources are extremely scarce. Weapons are makeshift, like crowbars, lead pipes, and rare 9mm handguns. Every corner smells of decay and oil.

Pirate Ocean.name: Pirate Ocean
Pirate Ocean.tagline: Sail cursed waters of the Black Reef
Pirate Ocean.worldRules: You are Captain Kirti, sailing the treacherous, shark-infested Black Reef under a perpetual heavy thunderstorm. Mythic leviathans, skeleton pirate ships, and cursed ghosts haunt the dark blue waves. Combat is settled with rusted cutlasses, flintlock pistols, and heavy ship cannons. Gold is the only currency that matters.

Magic Academy.name: Magic Academy
Magic Academy.tagline: Uncover secrets inside the Arcane Spire
Magic Academy.worldRules: You are Scholar Kirti, an apprentice at the grand Arcane Spire. The floating towers of the Academy are packed with rogue spell-books, mischievous imps, animated stone gargoyles, and forbidden library vaults. Energy flows as Mana. Spells require wands, magic crystals, and incantations.
